title: Carrion
body:
![Carrion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54a6c685acc0166274f55f8bd99b9fd2433063bc.png)

![NeedGeckolib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/931b4c495e5675476ab08ebfab31380f2b5ba81a.png)

Carrion introduces a new biome for players to explore, complete with diverse landscapes. Expect to encounter a wide array of unique monsters and creatures that inhabit this environment. In addition, players can obtain various new weapons and items crafted using the resources found within the biome. This mod has been tested for multiplayer compatibility and is compatible.
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
Some of the new Features include:
- New Biome
- New Mobs
- New Weapons
- New Items
- New Blocks
- New Structures
- New Fluids
________________________________________________________________________________________________

![Progress](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/762c613a51d1d5554e5a5f6d32542c0de4e59bad.png)
![CarrionRemasterComplete](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29462828bca89f034b18c543769c8efc3ed7a8cf.png)

The Carrion Mod had Been Remade, Next update will be all about Sounds
